description: Structured extraction schema for lease agreements or rent statements including tenant, landlord, property, and payment terms.

base_rent.instruction: Extract the base monthly rent as a numeric amount only (e.g., 685). Do not include currency symbols, commas, or text like 'per month'.

utilities.instruction: Monthly utilities charged through landlord if included.

fees.instruction: Recurring monthly fees (parking, pet rent, amenities, etc.).

total_monthly_payment.instruction: Total monthly payment including rent and all recurring charges.

start_date.instruction: Statement period start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.instruction: Statement period end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tenant_name.instruction: Extract the full legal name of the tenant or lessee exactly as shown in the document.

landlord_name.instruction: Extract the name of the landlord, property owner, or management company.

property_address.instruction: Extract the full rental property address including street, city, state, and ZIP code if available.

security_deposit.instruction: Extract the security deposit amount as a numeric amount only (e.g., 685). Do not include currency symbols or commas.

lease_start_date.instruction: Extract the lease start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

lease_end_date.instruction: Extract the lease end date in YYYY-MM-DD format if present.

payment_due_day.instruction: Extract only the numeric day of the month rent is due (e.g., 1, 15). Do not include ordinal suffixes or additional text.

balance_due.instruction: Extract total outstanding balance due as a numeric amount only (e.g., 685). Do not include currency symbols or commas.

lease_type.instruction: Classify the lease type if determinable from the document (e.g., fixed term, month to month, sublease).
